steps.title: Subtract 331.3 from both sides
steps.content:
Starting with $v = 331.3 + 0.606 \times T$, we need to isolate T. The constant 331.3 is added on the right side, so subtract it from both sides:
$$v - 331.3 = 0.606 \times T$$

steps.title: Divide by 0.606 to isolate T
steps.content:
Now divide both sides by 0.606:
$$T = \frac{v - 331.3}{0.606}$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
